name: Client / Sales Meeting
description: Capture client goals, deliverables, and next steps.

sections.title: Meeting Metadata
sections.instruction: State the date, client/account name, and the purpose of the meeting (e.g. renewal, upsell, check-in, onboarding) as stated or clearly evident from context.

sections.title: Attendees
sections.instruction: Client and vendor attendees with roles

sections.title: Client Goals & Success Criteria
sections.instruction: Describe what the client is trying to achieve and how they define success, in their own terms. Distinguish goals the client stated from things the team merely proposed.

sections.title: Agreed Deliverables
sections.instruction: List only deliverables both sides explicitly agreed to - not proposals still under discussion. Include the owner and due date for each.

sections.title: Commercial Terms Discussed
sections.instruction: Summarize pricing, contract terms, discounts, or budget figures discussed, using exact numbers as stated. If no commercial terms came up, say so explicitly.

sections.title: Risks & Concerns
sections.instruction: Client concerns, blockers, or escalation items

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.instruction: List concrete next steps with an owner and date. Include the speaker's own first-person commitments (e.g. "I'll follow up on..."), owned by "Me".
